user.title: Configure HA Voice Label Sync
user.description: Configure how Home Assistant entities are selected and exported.

data_description.backend: Select the voice assistant configuration to generate.
data_description.label: Entities carrying this Home Assistant label will be included.
data_description.output: Path of the generated YAML file inside Home Assistant.
data_description.backup_retention: Maximum number of previous generated files to retain. Use 0 to disable retention.
data_description.create_backup: Create a backup of the current output file before replacing it.
